creator: mi+thun@aldan.algebra.com
text:
On 05.12.2011 11:38, Hiroki Sato wrote:
>   Can you show me your installed libdata/pkgconfig/librtmp.pc?
>   @CRYPTO_REQ@ should be replaced with "", so removing Requires: line
>   will make no difference.  I want to know if you have something like
>   "Requires: foo" in librtmp.pc.

    prefix=/opt
    exec_prefix=${prefix}
    libdir=${exec_prefix}/lib
    incdir=${prefix}/include

    Name: librtmp
    Description: RTMP implementation
    Version: v2.3
    Requires: libssl,libcrypto
    URL: http://rtmpdump.mplayerhq.hu
    Libs: -L${libdir} -lrtmp -lz
    Cflags: -I${incdir}

Yours,

    -mi
